title: Agniswarar Temple, Kanjanur
tagline: Agniswarar Temple, Kanjanur — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Agniswarar Temple (கஞ்சனூர் அக்கினீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple in the village of Kanjanur, 18 kilometres north-east of Kumbakonam.
overview.description: The Agniswarar Temple (கஞ்சனூர் அக்கினீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple in the village of Kanjanur, 18 kilometres north-east of Kumbakonam. The presiding deity is Sukra (Venus). However, the main idol in the temple is that of "Agniswarar" or Shiva. In concordance with the Saivite belief that Shiva is all-pervading, Sukra is believed to be located within the stomach of the idol of Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Thirukoteeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Thirukoteeswarar Temple (திருக்கோடீசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Thirukodikaval in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvaduthurai
topPlaces.description: Thiruvavaduthurai is a village in Mayiladuthurai district, east-central Tamil Nadu, South India, where the Masilamaniswara Temple is located. Thiruvaduthurai Adheenam, one of the prominent Saiva Aadheenams (monasteries) in South India, is located adjacent to the temple complex.

topPlaces.name: Thiruppanandal
topPlaces.description: Thiruppanandal is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Suryanar Kovil
topPlaces.description: Suryanar Kovil (also called Suryanar Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Hindu Sun-God, Surya, located in the village of Suryanar Koil, nearby Aduthurai, Thanjavur District in Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Suriyanar, the Sun and his consorts Ushadevi and Pratyusha Devi.

topPlaces.name: Prananadeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Prananadeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirumangalakudi in Thanjavur District of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Prananatheswarar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Mangala Nayagi.

topPlaces.name: Thirumangalakudi
topPlaces.description: Thirumangalakudi is a village near Aduthurai in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. Prananadeswarar Temple, a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, is located here.

topPlaces.name: Kola Valvill Ramar Temple, Tiruvelliyangudi
topPlaces.description: Kolavalvil Ramar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu 19 km from Kumbakonam, Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is mentioned in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Kola Valvill Ramar and his consort Lakshmi as Maragathavalli.

topPlaces.name: Maruthuvakudi
topPlaces.description: Maruthuvakudi, also known as Aduthurai is a small panchayat town situated near Kumbakonam, on the way to Mayiladuthurai, located in the Thanjavur District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is the sub urban region of business city of Kumbakonam.

items.note: Thirukoteeswarar Temple (திருக்கோடீசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Thirukodikaval in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva.

Thiruvavaduthurai is a village in Mayiladuthurai district, east-central Tamil Nadu, South India, where the Masilamaniswara Temple is located. Thiruvaduthurai Adheenam, one of the prominent Saiva Aadheenams (monasteries) in South India, is located adjacent to the temple complex.
Thiruppanandal is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Suryanar Kovil (also called Suryanar Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Hindu Sun-God, Surya, located in the village of Suryanar Koil, nearby Aduthurai, Thanjavur District in Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Suriyanar, the Sun and his consorts Ushadevi and Pratyusha Devi.

Prananadeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirumangalakudi in Thanjavur District of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Prananatheswarar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Mangala Nayagi.
Thirumangalakudi is a village near Aduthurai in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. Prananadeswarar Temple, a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, is located here.

itinerary.title: Day 3 — Kola Valvill Ramar Temple, Tiruvelliyangudi & around

items.note: Kolavalvil Ramar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu 19 km from Kumbakonam, Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is mentioned in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Kola Valvill Ramar and his consort Lakshmi as Maragathavalli.

Maruthuvakudi, also known as Aduthurai is a small panchayat town situated near Kumbakonam, on the way to Mayiladuthurai, located in the Thanjavur District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is the sub urban region of business city of Kumbakonam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Agniswarar Temple, Kanjanur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Agniswarar Temple, Kanjanur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Agniswarar Temple, Kanjanur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (92 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (93 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Agniswarar Temple, Kanjanur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Agniswarar Temple, Kanjanur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Agniswarar Temple, Kanjanur?
faq.a: Stays in Agniswarar Temple, Kanjanur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Agniswarar Temple, Kanjanur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thirukoteeswarar Temple, Thiruvaduthurai, Thiruppanandal, Suryanar Kovil, Prananadeswarar Temple.
